basics.name: Reza Pour
basics.label: Senior Android Developer
basics.summary: Senior Android Developer with strong experience building scalable mobile platforms. Led a design system migration across 4 apps, 6 teams, and 16+ developers. Experienced in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and modern Android architecture, with a strong focus on ownership, reliability, and enabling teams to deliver faster.

work.name: ParshipMeet Group
highlights: Led design system migration across Lovoo, MeetMe, Skout, and Tagged — 4 apps serving 4.3M+ daily active users — aligning 6 teams and 16+ Android developers.
Improved feature delivery speed by ~50% through centralized UI components and design tokens adopted across all 4 apps.
Established UI standards via documentation, conventions, and reusable components, reducing inconsistencies and production issues.
Introduced Clean Architecture principles, supporting modular and scalable codebase evolution.
Acted as the go-to design system expert across teams, supporting developers with adoption questions and onboarding new joiners, while monitoring production stability via Firebase.

work.name: Sixt
highlights: Delivered customer-facing features for the Rent product in a cross-functional agile team.
Increased test coverage from below 40% to over 70% by driving unit testing practices.
Accelerated UI development by introducing Jetpack Compose into the codebase.
Refactored legacy components toward a modular Clean Architecture setup.
Enabled data-driven decisions through A/B testing and feature rollouts.

work.name: Cazoo
highlights: Designed and maintained a car refurbishment tracking system supporting internal operations.
Improved workflow responsiveness by ~30% using Kotlin Coroutines, Flow, and modular refactoring.
Partnered with backend engineers on API and architecture design.

work.name: Freelancer & Career Break
work.summary: Relocated from Iran to Germany during COVID, maintained technical skills through freelance Android work, and actively improved English.

work.name: Bato
highlights: Built a Persian virtual assistant app used by 20,000+ users with 98% crash-free stability.
Developed chatbot features for non-feature requests in collaboration with AI and backend teams.
Improved UX and app performance through user behavior analysis and experimentation, contributing to ~20% higher user retention.
Migrated architecture from MVC to MVVM, improving maintainability and scalability.

work.name: AdLif
highlights: Built the Android platform powering a digital advertising network across 500 taxis, managing content delivery to in-vehicle tablets at fleet scale.
Reduced internet usage by 50% through optimized video download, caching, and display algorithms.
Built a custom Android launcher for kiosk-mode deployments, improving device control and operational reliability.

work.name: Yana Group
work.summary: Developed internal Android apps for communication and content sharing.

education.institution: Institute for Higher Education ACECR Khouzestan

projects.name: F1 Companion App
projects.summary: A real-time Formula 1 companion app built with Jetpack Compose, Navigation 3, and the OpenF1 API. Features live timing data and Compose Canvas visualizations.
highlights: Jetpack Compose
Navigation 3
OpenF1 API
Coroutines

projects.name: Interval Timer App
projects.summary: A clean, customizable interval timer built with Jetpack Compose and Coroutines. Focused on smooth UX and precise timing behavior.
highlights: Jetpack Compose
Coroutines
